name: cozy-corkboard
author: cosyh
description: a cozy pixel-art corkboard task manager

scripts.electron:build:win: cross-env NODE_ENV=production vite build && electron-packager . "cozy corkboard" --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=release --overwrite --executableName="click to run" --ignore="release|src|.git|.github|scripts"
scripts.electron:build:mac: cross-env NODE_ENV=production vite build && electron-packager . "cozy corkboard" --platform=darwin --arch=universal --out=release --overwrite --executableName="click to run" --ignore="release|src|.git|.github|scripts"
